items.name: Enterprise migration dependency mapping
items.description: Discover common dependency, cutover, rollback, and landing-zone blockers in enterprise migration waves.
questions: Which dependencies are discovered too late?
Which legacy workloads need refactoring before migration?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.

items.name: Marketplace procurement and entitlement friction
items.description: Study where buyers, procurement, partners, and cloud admins lose track of private offers, entitlements, billing, and support ownership.
questions: Which private-offer steps require manual intervention?
Which entitlements are unclear after purchase?
Where does support ownership break between provider and partner?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.

items.name: Regulated workload approval evidence
items.description: Identify evidence packages required by security, risk, and audit stakeholders for regulated cloud workloads.
questions: Which controls block approval most often?
Which regional or sovereignty constraints change architecture decisions?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.
